2184520.name: Coffee Talk Episode 2 - Soundtrack
2184520.description:
Coffee Talk Episode 2 - Original Soundtracks (OST)

Need relaxing lo-fi chill tunes from Coffee Talk Ep. 2 to accompany your warm drink while you work or study? We got you covered!

DLC Content
This DLC package contains Coffee Talk Episode 2 - Original soundtracks (OST). It's now over 30 original soundtracks (OST) from Coffee Talk Ep. 2: Hibiscus & Butterfly, composed by Andrew Jeremy.
